Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: There are two cases A1 and B2 with identical sequence of activities

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The low level events are 1 Retrieve raw metal sheet 2 Scan barcode 3 Place metal sheet on table 4 Align metal sheet 5 Preheat metal sheet 6 Pick up welding tool 7 Weld corner A 8 Weld corner B 9 Measure weld integrity 10 Apply protective coating 11 Dry coating 12 Visual check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to group these into high level steps

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Material preparation steps 1 to 5 retrieve scan place align preheat This is preparing the sheet for welding

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Welding assembly steps 6 to 8 pick up tool weld corners Possibly also include step 9

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But step 9 is measurement after welding so might be part of quality check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Alternatively we can have Assembly pick up tool weld and then Quality Inspection measure weld visual check but note that later there is also coating and drying

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually the sequence after welding they measure weld integrity then apply coating dry then visual check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So maybe grouping Material Preparation Welding Weld Quality Check Coating Final Inspection

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively treat measure weld integrity as part of quality inspection along with visual check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But visual check is later after coating so perhaps separate In Process Quality Check after welding and Final Quality Check after coating

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Usually in manufacturing you have intermediate checks so we need to group based on temporal closeness and logical process phases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The events happen in sequence Between preheat and welding there is pick up welding tool which is a setup for welding So the welding phase includes picking up tool and welding Then after welding they immediately measure weld integrity quality check Then coating and drying then final visual check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we have 1 Material Preparation retrieve scan place align preheat 2 Welding pick up tool weld corners 3 Weld Inspection measure weld integrity 4 Coating apply coating dry 5 Final Inspection visual check

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note that preheat is part of preparation but it is done by Heating Unit not operator That is fine Also align is by Robot Arm So group by function

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Some might combine Welding and Weld Inspection into a Welding and Inspection step but that mixes process and quality Better to separate

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the sample the sequence is consistent We will propose high level steps with rationale
